description_long: This is an adult pedestrian figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a fitted jacket over a shirt and slim pants. The individual is wearing a face mask, which covers the lower half of the face, and has shoulder-length, wavy hair. The hands are gloved, and the arms are extended horizontally to the sides. The footwear consists of athletic-style sneakers, and the overall build is average and proportional. The figure's posture is upright and neutral, suitable for walking or standing in a city environment. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, streetwise appearance, possibly for cooler weather.
description: An adult pedestrian in urban casual attire with a jacket, slim pants, gloves, face mask, and sneakers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has shoulder-length wavy hair and a modern, streetwise look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face mask, jacket, shirt, gloves, and sneakers, with arms extended and hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the jacket and pants, and the side of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and hair, with both arms extended and the back of the sneakers visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, jacket, pants, and sneakers from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket over shirt, slim pants, gloves, face mask
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
